overview: YodhaMedia is a premium digital growth agency website targeting healthcare and business sectors. Features a dual light/dark theme with a deep purple and golden yellow brand palette, glassmorphism navigation, animated service cards, a multi-page content hub with blog filtering and dynamic table of contents, and embedded JSON-LD structured data for SEO authority.
features: Dual-theme system (light/dark) with brand colors and gradient dark background
Glassmorphism sticky Navbar with theme toggle and mobile menu
Home page Hero with 'Book Consultation' CTA, Trust Bar, and Services Snapshot
About page with YodhaMedia Advantage, team cards, and industry expertise blocks
Services page with animated ServiceCard components and Framer Motion hover effects
Blog hub with category filtering, search, and 6-8 placeholder articles
Dynamic blog post page with auto-generated Table of Contents and related posts
Scroll-triggered fade-in-up animations across all major sections
JSON-LD ProfessionalService and MedicalBusiness structured data schemas
Responsive design across all screen sizes
